response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and open-source contributions showcases technical depth and adaptability. While his experience spans diverse languages and domains, his recent roles and projects strongly match the job's requirements.
strengths: Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with 6+ years of full-stack development experience.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent development and internal tooling, directly relevant to the role.
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in architecture, testing, and scalability.
concerns: Career gap (October 2025–present) may require clarification during the interview.
Broad but varied technical experience (e.g., DLang, Swift) could dilute focus on the primary stack.
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, though his Node.js expertise likely translates well.
